headline: Flow Control Group to Receive Investment from Neuberger Private Markets
summary: NEW YORK, April 30, 2026--Flow Control Group ("the Company" or "FCG"), a leading North American network of technical flow control and industrial automation distributors and solutions providers, today announced that KKR, the Company’s existing investor, and Neuberger Private Markets ("Neuberger") have agreed to jointly acquire the Company. headline: KKR Makes Strategic Investment to Accelerate Growth of MLS NEXT Pro
summary: NEW YORK, April 30, 2026--Major League Soccer ("MLS") and KKR, a leading global investment firm, today announced a strategic investment to accelerate the growth of MLS NEXT Pro. In connection, MLS and funds managed by KKR have formed Hometown Soccer Holdings ("HSH"), a new platform created to support the evolution of MLS NEXT Pro.
